dimension.description: Design dimension the invariant belongs to (e.g. `DIM-3`).

cost-of-load.description: Relative cost of loading/checking the invariant (kebab-case wire name).

applies-to.description: Scopes the invariant applies to (kebab-case wire name).

axiom_overlap.description: Overlapping axioms (snake_case wire name preserved verbatim).

phase-affinity.description: SDLC phases the invariant is most relevant to (kebab-case wire name).

workflow-affinity.description: Workflows the invariant is most relevant to (kebab-case wire name).

state-affinity.description: Ontological states the invariant is most relevant to (kebab-case wire name).

enforcement.description: How the invariant is enforced (check tree or audit prompt).

integrity-class.description: Integrity class the invariant guards (kebab-case wire name).

description:
A single invariant-catalog entry (#98), v3. Carries the v2 fields plus the
additive v3 fields. **Every v3 field is optional** so a v2 catalog parses
unchanged (back-compat).

Wire names are preserved verbatim — kebab-case (`cost-of-load`, `applies-to`,
the affinities, `integrity-class`) and snake_case (`axiom_overlap`) — via
quoted TypeSpec identifiers, so the generated decoder validates Exarchos's
YAML frontmatter without re-casing. Declarative-only (LB-1 / INV-4): the only
enforcement payload is the `Enforcement` union, which itself carries no
executable code.
